AnimeTrack.title: AnimeTrack
AnimeTrack.description: Represents an anime tracked by a user with watch status and rating.

userId.description: The UID of the user who is tracking this anime.

animeId.description: The external ID (e.g., Jikan API MAL ID) of the anime.

title.description: The English or romaji title of the anime.

imageUrl.description: The poster image URL of the anime.

animeType.description: The medium type, e.g., Movie, TV.

episodesWatched.description: Number of episodes watched by the user.

status.description: Status of watching (e.g., currently watching, completed, planned to watch).

notes.description: Personal journal notes, thoughts, or comments.

/animeTracks/{trackId}.description: Collection of tracked anime records for each user.
